findings.issue: The updateTodo handler does not return a 404 status code when no rows are updated.
findings.recommendation: Check this.changes (or similar) after the UPDATE operation and return a 404 status code if no rows were affected.

findings.issue: The deleteTodo handler always returns a 204 status code without verifying if a row was actually deleted.
findings.recommendation: Check this.changes after the DELETE operation and return a 404 status code if no rows were deleted.

output.summary: The code implementation contains critical defects in the update and delete handlers, as they fail to correctly handle cases where no rows are affected (missing 404 responses).
